branch_metadata.branch_rationale: Internal structural / framework-internal diagnostic; branch-blind algebraic or seed-level test

verdict: Galerkin-FEM framework yields the correct N^{-1/3} and N^{-2/3} leading and sub-leading scalings via Cea + Aubin-Nitsche. The framework-rational prefactors c=2*alpha_xi^2*gamma and d=-(1+gamma)*c are CONSISTENT with the framework but the Lipschitz and Hessian seminorms of the residual relative to the stress-energy must be measured (not derived) on the canonical lattice. Hypothesis remains a hypothesis; the N-scaling shape is derived but the prefactors are not.
